title: Athermality: Quantum Thermodynamics as Resource Theory
description: Master the resource theory of athermality - understanding how deviation from thermal equilibrium serves as a resource for work extraction, the role of free energy, and the fundamental thermodynamic laws from a quantum information perspective.
learningObjectives: Define thermal operations and explain why they are the natural free operations in thermodynamics
Calculate free energy and understand its role as a thermodynamic potential
Understand the second law of thermodynamics from a resource-theoretic perspective
Analyze work extraction protocols and their fundamental limits
Explore the role of coherence in quantum thermodynamics
Apply the resource theory to quantum heat engines and refrigerators
